reviews.comment:
La estación muy linda pero NO paro más. Fui a comprar una bebida y cigarrillos . Me puso un impuesto por los cigarrillos de $ 10 por paquete, ante mi asombro le dije que me diera un comprobante por dicho impuesto y la respuesta de la empleada fue: NO SE LO PUEDO HACER , MI PATRÓN ES EL LADRON VENGA MAÑANA Y PIDASELO A EL . A NOSOTRAS NOS HACEN PONER LA CARA ANTE ESTE ROBO. DISCUTO CON TODOS LOS CLIENTES POR LO MISMO Y NO VEO QUE NINGUNO HABLE CON EL.  Yo me detuve como a las 5 AM y soy de Mza perosiempre viajo por la ruta 7 , en cualquier momento pasaré por ahí y espero encontrarme con esa empleada que te desafía.
PERO SI LES ASEGURO QUE PARA CARGAR COMBUSTIBLE O COMPRAR UN SOLO CARAMELO NO PARO MASSSS

(Translated by Google)
The station is very nice, but I'm not stopping there again. I went to buy a drink and cigarettes. She charged me a $10 tax per pack of cigarettes. To my astonishment, I asked for a receipt for that tax, and the employee's response was: "I can't give you one. My boss is the thief. Come back tomorrow and ask him." We're the ones who have to take the fall for this robbery. I argue with all the customers about the same thing, and I don't see any of them talking to him. I stopped there around 5 AM, and I'm from Mendoza, but I always travel on Route 7. I'll be passing by there again sometime, and I hope to run into that employee who challenges you.

But I assure you, I'm not stopping there again, not even to fill up my tank or buy a single piece of candy!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvZzd6TWd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Es un local destacable de la red. Ideal para una pausa en el camino. Baños limpios. Oferta variada de productos para consumo. Personal amable. Seguridad a la vista.

(Translated by Google)
It is a notable place on the network. Ideal for a break along the way. Clean bathrooms. Varied offer of consumer products. Friendly staff. Security in sight.

reviews.comment:
Pongan duchas y seguridad no se puede parar más ! Cuidado amigos camioneros , en la playa te abren el camión y te roban y también en el shop te asaltan con los precios !

(Translated by Google)
Install showers and security, we can't stop anymore! Beware, fellow truckers, they'll break into your truck and rob you at the beach, and they'll rip you off at the shops with their exorbitant prices!
